title: Geregu Power Board To Meet On January 27, 2023
description: The board of directors of Geregu Power Plc, said it will be having its meeting on Friday, 27th January, 2023, to consider and approve its fourth quarter 2022 unaudited financial statements for the per
html:
The board of directors of Geregu Power Plc, said it will be having its meeting on Friday, 27th January, 2023, to consider and approve its fourth quarter 2022 unaudited financial statements for the period ended 31st December 2022 and the 2022 audited financial statements respectively.

This according to the company is in accordance with the provisions of 17.18(a) Closed Period Rules, Rulebook of the Exchange, 2015 (As amended) (Issuers’ Rules), the Closed Period for trading in the shares the Company commenced on January 1st 2023 in respect of the Q4 2022 UFS and the 2022 Audited Financial Statements respectively.

Consequently, no director, persons discharging managerial responsibility, employees with sensitive information, advisers and consultants of the company, other insiders and their connected persons may directly or indirectly deal in the securities of the company until 24 hours after the release of the fourth quarter 2022 unaudited financial statement or the 2022 audited financial statements through the Issuers’ Portal of Nigerian Exchange Limited and by extension, the general public.
